testCase.name: LogoutDialogComponent should create
LogoutDialogComponent should call clearSession and navigate to login on confirm
LogoutDialogComponent should close dialog on cancel
LoginComponent should create
LoginComponent should navigate on successful login
LoginComponent should show error modal on failed login
LoginComponent should mark form as touched when invalid
LoginComponent should call openHelpDialog
LoginComponent should expose email and password getters
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should create
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should start at step 1
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should handle step 1 recovery request
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should handle step 1 error (should still go to step 2 for security)
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should validate passwords match in step 2
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should handle step 2 reset confirmation success
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should handle step 2 reset confirmation error
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should close dialog
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should return form controls via getters
ForgotPasswordDialogComponent should mark emailForm as touched if invalid on solicitarRecuperacion
EntradaDialogComponent should create
EntradaDialogComponent should initialize form with data
EntradaDialogComponent should close dialog with form value on submit
EntradaDialogComponent should not close dialog if form is invalid
SuccessDialogComponent should create
SuccessDialogComponent should have correct data bound
SuccessDialogComponent should close with primary action
SuccessDialogComponent should close with secondary action
SuccessDialogComponent should close with close action
SuccessDialogComponent should work with success accent color
SuccessDialogComponent should work with warning accent color
SuccessDialogComponent should work without optional fields
LayoutComponent should create
LayoutComponent should handle mobile view transition and auto-open sidenav on desktop
LayoutComponent should filter and sort notifications correctly
LayoutComponent should toggle profile dropdown on button click
LayoutComponent should toggle notifications dropdown and handle both branches
LayoutComponent should open config modal and close others
LayoutComponent should handle missing user data gracefully
LayoutComponent should handle document click to close dropdowns
LayoutComponent should open various dialogs with event prevention
LayoutComponent should navigate to nuevo pedido
ConfirmDialogComponent should create
ConfirmDialogComponent should have correct data
ConfirmDialogComponent should close with true when confirmed
ConfirmDialogComponent should close with false when cancelled
ConfirmDialogComponent should work with primary accent color
ConfirmDialogComponent should work with warning accent color
ConfirmDialogComponent should work without optional fields
BaseTableComponent should be created
BaseTableComponent should set paginator on dataSource when ViewChild is initialized
BaseTableComponent should set sort on dataSource when ViewChild is initialized
AjusteDialogComponent should create
AjusteDialogComponent should initialize form with data
AjusteDialogComponent should close dialog with form value on submit when valid
AjusteDialogComponent should not close dialog if reason is too short
ReportesComponent should create
ReportesComponent should calculate cashPercentage correctly
ReportesComponent should calculate transferPercentage correctly
ReportesComponent should fetch ingresos on date change
ReportesComponent should fetch saldos and map correctly
ReportesComponent should export excel
ReportesComponent should return correct rank color class
ReportesComponent should return correct rank progress class
ReportesComponent should handle errors in fetchIngresos
ReportesComponent should handle errors in fetchSaldos
ReportesComponent should handle errors in exportExcel
ReportesComponent should handle errors in fetchTopProducts
ReportesComponent should navigate to inventory on goToProduct
ReportesComponent should handle different response formats in fetchTopProducts
ReportesComponent should handle nullish response in fetchIngresos
UIService should be created
UIService should open SuccessDialog on showSuccess
UIService should open ConfirmDialog on showConfirm
UIService should open Error dialog on showError
AuthService should be created
AuthService should login and set session
AuthService should get access token
AuthService should get refresh token
AuthService should get user
AuthService should update user
AuthService should handle invalid user json
AuthService should handle no user json
AuthService should clear session
AuthService should check if authenticated
AuthService should handle login with remember me
AuthService should update user with remember me
AuthService should solicitar recuperación de password
AuthService should reset password public
AuthService should restore session from localStorage in constructor if remember is true
PerfilComponent should create
PerfilComponent ngOnInit should initialize form with user data
PerfilComponent ngOnInit should handle user without space in name
PerfilComponent ngOnInit should handle user with empty nombre
PerfilComponent ngOnInit should handle null user gracefully
PerfilComponent actualizarPerfil should not call service if form is invalid
PerfilComponent actualizarPerfil should call service and update state on success
PerfilComponent actualizarPerfil should handle missing user on success without crashing
PerfilComponent actualizarPerfil should set error on failure
PerfilComponent actualizarPerfil should set fallback error on failure
PerfilComponent navigation should navigate home on goBack
PerfilComponent getters should return controls
ClientesComponent should create the component
ClientesComponent should start in list view mode
ClientesComponent should load clients on init
ClientesComponent should log error when loading clients fails
ClientesComponent should apply filter on search change
ClientesComponent should reset paginator on search change
ClientesComponent filterPredicate should match by name
ClientesComponent filterPredicate should match by id
ClientesComponent filterPredicate should not match unrelated strings
ClientesComponent sortingDataAccessor should return lowercase name
ClientesComponent sortingDataAccessor should return correo
ClientesComponent sortingDataAccessor should return empty string for unknown property
ClientesComponent addPhoneField should add a new phone control
ClientesComponent removePhoneField should remove a phone when more than one exists
ClientesComponent removePhoneField should NOT remove the last phone
ClientesComponent openAddForm should switch to add mode
ClientesComponent openAddForm should reset error message
ClientesComponent openAddForm should reset phones array with one empty control
ClientesComponent openEditForm should switch to edit mode
ClientesComponent openEditForm should patch form values
ClientesComponent openEditForm should populate phones from client.phones
ClientesComponent openEditForm should add empty phone control when client has no phones
ClientesComponent openEditForm should clear error message
ClientesComponent closeForm should return to list mode
ClientesComponent openDeleteModal should open confirm dialog
ClientesComponent confirmDelete should call delete and open success dialog on success
ClientesComponent confirmDelete should open error dialog when delete fails
ClientesComponent saveClient should mark form as touched and not submit when invalid
ClientesComponent saveClient should call create when in add mode
ClientesComponent saveClient should go to list after primary action on success dialog
ClientesComponent saveClient should go to list when dialog result is null
ClientesComponent saveClient should call openAddForm again on secondary action after create
ClientesComponent saveClient should stay in edit mode on secondary action when editing
ClientesComponent saveClient should call update when in edit mode
ClientesComponent saveClient should set duplicate-phone error for status 400
ClientesComponent saveClient should set duplicate-phone error for status 409
ClientesComponent saveClient should set duplicate-phone error for status 500
ClientesComponent saveClient should set generic error for other status codes
PagosComponent should create
PagosComponent should compute totalMonthlyBalance correctly
PagosComponent savePayment should call registrarAbono on add mode
PagosComponent savePayment debería llamar a editarAbono cuando viewMode es "edit" y el id existe
PagosComponent savePayment should log error when saving fails
PagosComponent should handle delete lifecycle
PagosComponent should handle view modal
PagosComponent should filter correctly
PagosComponent should not save if form is invalid
PagosComponent should sort correctly
PagosComponent should cover router navigation
PagosComponent should cover paginator branches
PagosComponent should apply filters when search changes
PagosComponent should return max amount for selected order
PagosComponent should handle amount error when exceeding max
PagosComponent should open edit form and patch values
PagosComponent should close form and return to list
PagosComponent should call editarAbono on edit mode
PagosComponent should handle savePayment with primary action result
PagosComponent should open and close view modal
PagosComponent should handle fetchPayments error
PagosComponent should handle loadPayments error
PagosComponent openDeleteModal should show confirm and call confirmDelete if confirmed
PagosComponent openDeleteModal should NOT call confirmDelete if cancelled
PagosComponent should handle savePayment with secondary action to add another
PagosComponent should map payment types correctly
PagosComponent should handle savePayment error
PagosComponent should show error when delete fails
HelpDialogComponent should create
HelpDialogComponent should close dialog when close() is called
RestablecerCorreoComponent should create
RestablecerCorreoComponent solicitarCodigoActual should set state on success
RestablecerCorreoComponent solicitarCodigoActual should set error on failure
RestablecerCorreoComponent solicitarCodigoActual should use fallback error message on failure
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should move to step 3 if step is 2 and form is valid
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should not move to step 3 if step is 2 and form is invalid
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should call service if step is 3 and forms are valid
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should not proceed if form is invalid in step 3
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should not proceed if step2 form is invalid in step 3
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should do nothing if step is not 2 or 3
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should set error on failure in step 3
RestablecerCorreoComponent validarActualYSolicitarNuevo should set fallback error on failure in step 3
RestablecerCorreoComponent confirmarNuevoCorreo should not call service if step4Form is invalid
RestablecerCorreoComponent confirmarNuevoCorreo should call service and update state on success
RestablecerCorreoComponent confirmarNuevoCorreo should set error on failure
RestablecerCorreoComponent confirmarNuevoCorreo should set fallback error on failure
RestablecerCorreoComponent navigation should close modal and navigate to home on closeSuccessAndGoBack
RestablecerCorreoComponent navigation should go back a step if step > 1 on goBack
RestablecerCorreoComponent navigation should navigate to home if step === 1 on goBack
RestablecerCorreoComponent getters should return form controls
InventoryService should be created
InventoryService should getAll and map data array
InventoryService should getAll using content fallback
InventoryService should create a product with string unit
InventoryService should create a product with numeric unit ID
InventoryService should create a product with empty unit fallback
InventoryService should update a product with string unit
InventoryService should update a product with numeric unit ID
InventoryService should delete (ajuste a 0)
InventoryService should registrarEntrada
InventoryService should ajustarInventario
InventoryService should addComposicion
InventoryService should map inventory item with various fallbacks
InventoryService should map inventory item with minimum data and nulls
InventoryService should getUnidadesMedida
OrderService should fetch all orders
OrderService should create order with various payload options
OrderService should update order with various payload options
OrderService should handle actions
OrderService should manage order draft
OrderService should map order summary with various fallbacks and payment status
OrderService should use default values in create when data is missing
OrderService should handle alternative field names in update
CambiarContrasenaComponent should create
CambiarContrasenaComponent should have invalid form initially
CambiarContrasenaComponent solicitarCodigo should set state correctly on success
CambiarContrasenaComponent solicitarCodigo should handle error
CambiarContrasenaComponent solicitarCodigo should handle error fallback
CambiarContrasenaComponent cambiarPassword should not submit if form is invalid
CambiarContrasenaComponent cambiarPassword should not submit if passwords do not match
CambiarContrasenaComponent cambiarPassword should set showSuccessModal to true on success
CambiarContrasenaComponent cambiarPassword should set error message on failure
CambiarContrasenaComponent cambiarPassword should use fallback error message on failure
CambiarContrasenaComponent modals and navigation should navigate home on goBack
CambiarContrasenaComponent modals and navigation should navigate home and close modal on closeSuccessAndGoBack
CambiarContrasenaComponent modals and navigation should toggle help modal
CambiarContrasenaComponent getters should return controls
HomeComponent should create
HomeComponent should calculate getters correctly
HomeComponent should initialize chart with context
HomeComponent should handle missing context gracefully
HomeComponent should handle null/undefined service responses gracefully
HomeComponent should update chart if instance exists when data is loaded
InventarioFormComponent should create
InventarioFormComponent should disable purchasePrice and wastePercent for ELABORADO
InventarioFormComponent should enable purchasePrice and wastePercent for INSUMO
InventarioFormComponent should add a component when addComponent is called
InventarioFormComponent should remove a component
InventarioFormComponent should call create on submit when mode is add
InventarioFormComponent should call update on submit when mode is edit
InventarioFormComponent should show error when submit fails
InventarioFormComponent should populate form when product input changes
InventarioFormComponent should cap wastePercent at 100
InventarioFormComponent should reset form when mode changes to add
InventarioFormComponent should calculate total cost when allProducts change
InventarioFormComponent should detect duplicate insumos
InventarioFormComponent should detect when quantity exceeds available stock
InventarioFormComponent should show error if adding an existing insumo
InventarioFormComponent should show error if adding insumo with zero stock
InventarioFormComponent should filter insumos correctly
InventarioFormComponent should return empty string for non-existent insumo name
InventarioFormComponent should return default unit if insumo not found
InventarioFormComponent should mark form as touched if invalid on submit
InventarioFormComponent should handle composition saving on submit
InventarioFormComponent should use newUnitName if unit is NEW_UNIT
InventarioFormComponent should emit formClose on onCancel
PaymentService should be created
PaymentService should registrarAbono
PaymentService should registrarAbono with transferencia and referencia
PaymentService should editarAbono
PaymentService should eliminarAbono
PaymentService should getReporteIngresos
PaymentService should exportarReporteIngresos
PaymentService should getSaldosPendientes
PaymentService should exportarSaldosPendientes
PaymentService should create via registrarAbono (deprecated)
PaymentService should emit error from create when idPedido is missing
PaymentService should emit error from delete (deprecated)
PaymentService should getPayments with default params
PaymentService should getTopSellingProducts with custom sorting
PaymentService should getUnifiedSaldos and map data correctly including fallback for code
PaymentService should getUnifiedSaldos with empty response
PaymentService should use pedidoId if idPedido is missing in create
App should create the app
PaginationComponent should create
PaginationComponent should calculate pagination correctly on changes
PaginationComponent should calculate displayed items correctly for last page
PaginationComponent should prevent negative displayed items
PaginationComponent should default totalPages to 1 if totalItems is 0
PaginationComponent should emit pageChange when onPageChange is called with a valid page
PaginationComponent should not emit pageChange for out of bounds or same page
ClientService should fetch all clients with search term
ClientService should map data correctly from content or data fields
ClientService should handle empty data structure
ClientService should use alternative field names in create and update
guestGuard should return true if not authenticated
guestGuard should navigate to /home and return false if authenticated
authInterceptor should add Authorization header if token exists
authInterceptor should not add Authorization header if token does not exist
authInterceptor should clear session and navigate to /login on 401 error
authInterceptor should only throw error if status is not 401
PedidosComponent should create the component
PedidosComponent should start in list view mode
PedidosComponent should open add form when queryParam new=true
PedidosComponent should populate dataSource on loadOrders
PedidosComponent should log error when loadOrders fails
PedidosComponent should map clients from loadClients
PedidosComponent should log error when loadClients fails
PedidosComponent should map products from loadProducts
PedidosComponent should log error when loadProducts fails
PedidosComponent should apply filter on search change
PedidosComponent should reset paginator on search change
PedidosComponent filterPredicate should match by nombreCliente
PedidosComponent filterPredicate should match by codigoUnico
PedidosComponent filterPredicate should not match unrelated strings
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor returns codigoUnico for codigo
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor falls back to idPedido when codigoUnico is empty
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor returns nombreCliente for cliente
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor returns clientName when nombreCliente is empty
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor returns estadoPedido for estado
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor returns timestamp for fecha
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor returns saldoPendiente for saldo
PedidosComponent sortingDataAccessor returns empty string for unknown property
PedidosComponent subtotalEstimate should calculate correctly
PedidosComponent subtotalEstimate should default missing values to 0
PedidosComponent selectedClientName should return client name when found in clientsList
PedidosComponent selectedClientName should return currentOrderClientName when client not found in list
PedidosComponent selectedClientName should return "Cliente Desconocido" when no id and no currentName
PedidosComponent selectedClientName should return currentOrderClientName when clientId is null
PedidosComponent addItem should add a new item to the form array
PedidosComponent removeItem should remove the item at given index
PedidosComponent openAddForm should switch to add mode
PedidosComponent openAddForm should clear items and add one default item
PedidosComponent openAddForm should set a default deliveryDate 14 days ahead
PedidosComponent closeForm should return to list mode and clear everything
PedidosComponent openEditForm should skip and show dialog when order is finished/cancelled
PedidosComponent openEditForm should call getById and populate form for editable order
PedidosComponent openEditForm should log error when getById fails
PedidosComponent populateOrderForm should add empty item when productos is empty
PedidosComponent crearCliente should save draft and navigate
PedidosComponent ngOnInit should restore draft if exists and new=true
PedidosComponent populateOrderForm should reset form before patching
PedidosComponent populateOrderForm should use idCliente when cliente is missing
PedidosComponent buildItemsFromProducts should set null productId when no matching product
PedidosComponent openActivarProduccionModal should open confirm dialog
PedidosComponent confirmActivarProduccion should call activarProduccion and open success dialog when confirmed
PedidosComponent confirmActivarProduccion should open error dialog when fails
PedidosComponent openDeleteModal should open confirm dialog
PedidosComponent confirmDelete should call cancelar and open success dialog on success
PedidosComponent confirmDelete should open error dialog when cancelar fails
PedidosComponent saveOrder should mark form as touched and not submit when invalid
PedidosComponent saveOrder should call create when form has no id
PedidosComponent saveOrder should go to list after primary action
PedidosComponent saveOrder should go to list when dialog result is null
PedidosComponent saveOrder should call openAddForm on secondary action when creating
PedidosComponent saveOrder should log error when create fails
PedidosComponent saveOrder should call update when form has an id
PedidosComponent saveOrder should NOT call openAddForm on secondary action when editing
PedidosComponent openDetail should call getById and show detail view
PedidosComponent openFormalizeView should switch to formalize mode and apply filter
PedidosComponent setFormalizeFilter should filter the formalize list
PedidosComponent openEditFromDetail should populate form from selectedOrderDetails
PedidosComponent getPaymentPercentage should calculate correctly
InventarioComponent should create the component
InventarioComponent should initialise with list view mode
InventarioComponent should load inventory on init
InventarioComponent should filter low stock products
InventarioComponent should change filter and apply it
InventarioComponent should calculate total inventory value
InventarioComponent should open add form
InventarioComponent should open edit form with full product details
InventarioComponent should call delete service after confirmation
InventarioComponent should call registrarEntrada when dialog returns a result
InventarioComponent should call ajustarInventario when dialog returns a result
InventarioComponent should trigger pending add stock modal if id is present
InventarioComponent should handle addStock and search query params
InventarioComponent should handle sorting for all columns
InventarioComponent should handle errors in registrarEntrada
InventarioComponent should handle errors in ajustarInventario
InventarioComponent should handle errors in confirmDelete
InventarioComponent should handle errors in openEditForm
InventarioComponent should reload and close form on onSaved
ListHelper should handle sort direction toggle
ListHelper should handle switching columns
ListHelper should get correct sort icon
ListHelper should sort array asc
ListHelper should sort array desc
ListHelper should not sort if no column
ListHelper should handle equal values during sort
PerfilService should be created
PerfilService Password should solicitarCodigoPassword
PerfilService Password should cambiarPassword
PerfilService Correo should solicitarCodigoCorreoActual
PerfilService Correo should validarActualYSolicitarNuevo
PerfilService Correo should confirmarCambioCorreo
PerfilService Perfil should actualizarPerfil
authGuard should return true if authenticated
authGuard should navigate to /login and return false if not authenticated
ScreenSizeService should be created
ScreenSizeService isMobile$ should emit true when viewport matches MOBILE breakpoint
ScreenSizeService isMobile$ should emit false when viewport does not match MOBILE breakpoint
ScreenSizeService isMobile$ should not emit duplicate consecutive values
ScreenSizeService isTablet$ should emit true when viewport matches TABLET breakpoint
ScreenSizeService isTablet$ should emit false when viewport does not match TABLET breakpoint
ScreenSizeService isBelowDesktop$ should emit true when viewport is below desktop
ScreenSizeService isBelowDesktop$ should emit false when viewport is desktop size
ScreenSizeService Signals isMobile signal should have a boolean initial value
ScreenSizeService Signals isTablet signal should have a boolean initial value
ScreenSizeService Signals isBelowDesktop signal should have a boolean initial value
ScreenSizeService Signals isMobile signal should update reactively
ScreenSizeService BREAKPOINTS constants should have correct MOBILE breakpoint string
ScreenSizeService BREAKPOINTS constants should have correct TABLET breakpoint string
ScreenSizeService BREAKPOINTS constants should have correct BELOW_DESKTOP breakpoint string
